# SOPMaster — Full Documentation
> Professional operational documentation platform for consultants.
> Base URL: https://sopmaster.tech

## About
SOPMaster is a professional operational documentation platform purpose-built for consultants, consultancy firms and documentation professionals. We provide the infrastructure to create, manage and maintain structured Standard Operating Procedures, operational checklists and department-level documentation that improves consistency, efficiency and client delivery.

## Core Features

### Standard Operating Procedures
Create structured SOP documents with process mapping, step-by-step workflows, decision points and compliance references. Each document includes a cover page, table of contents and verification hash for auditability.

### Operational Checklists
Generate reusable checklists for recurring processes, compliance reviews, onboarding procedures and operational governance.

### Batch Documentation Packages
Create department-level documentation packages generating complete SOP libraries across an entire organisation for restructuring programmes and operational transformation projects.

### Document Vault
Centralised repository with search, version tracking and download. Every document stamped with a unique verification hash for authenticity.

## Pricing (Monthly)
- Solo Professional: £400/mo — 300 credits
- Small Consultancy: £2,500/mo — 2,500 credits
- Medium Consultancy: £5,100/mo — 6,000 credits
- Large Consultancy: £9,000/mo — 12,000 credits

### Platform Pages
- Home / Dashboard: https://sopmaster.tech/
- SOP Builder: https://sopmaster.tech/forge
- Checklist Builder: https://sopmaster.tech/checklist
- Batch Generator: https://sopmaster.tech/batch
- Document Vault: https://sopmaster.tech/armory
- Administration: https://sopmaster.tech/settings

## Technical
- Platform: Next.js 14 (web application)
- Hosting: Netlify (global CDN)
- Domain: sopmaster.tech
- Language: English (UK)
- Currency: GBP (£)
- Payment Processor: Stripe
- Authentication: JWT-based with PIN login
- Database: Turso (SQLite)
